about.title: About Media-Tech
about.subtitle: Thoughtful software for collectors, creators, and researchers
about.missionDescription: We build tools that help people discover, organize, reflect on, and research knowledge. Our products are designed with privacy, simplicity, and genuine utility in mind.
about.privacyDescription: Your data belongs to you. We design with local storage and no unnecessary cloud dependencies.
about.simplicityDescription: Beautiful, intuitive interfaces that let you focus on what matters.
about.qualityDescription: Well-crafted software that stands the test of time.

collectra.name: Collectra
collectra.description: Personal Collection Manager for Mac & Windows. Catalog vinyl records, cameras, books, hi-fi equipment, CDs, cassettes, and computers with powerful organization tools and 100% local storage.
features: Import from Excel, CSV, JSON, and barcode scans

fetchera.name: Fetchera
fetchera.description: iOS barcode scanner and market price checker. Scan items in real-time, check market prices across multiple databases, and avoid duplicate purchases when integrated with Collectra.
features: Support for Discogs, Open Library, Google Books, eBay

resontra.name: Resontra
resontra.description: iOS ritual journal for books, records, and art that stays with you. Begin sessions, capture notes and excerpts with handwriting and photos, and end with reflection. Features beautiful paper-like experience with lock protection.
features: Authentic book-like experience with page turns

bam.name: BAM Literature Assistant
bam.description: Academic research tool for biomedical literature search, retrieval, and AI-powered review generation. Designed for researchers in biology, agriculture, and medicine with multi-source support and intelligent summarization.
features: Multi-database search (PubMed, Europe PMC, bioRxiv, OpenAlex)
Full-text retrieval with automatic PDF download
AI-powered review generation (Claude or Zhipu GLM)
